## Validation

- [ ] `swift test --parallel`
- [ ] coverage and line-count guards
- [ ] iOS Simulator build
- [ ] tvOS Simulator build
- [ ] DocC build when public API/docs changed
- [ ] device-only checks documented when applicable

## Compatibility and safety

- [ ] No unintended public API break
- [ ] Swift 6 concurrency reviewed
- [ ] Accessibility/localization reviewed for UI changes
- [ ] Logs and fixtures contain no secrets or private media URLs
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
